svg.text: Click a row to pin details · Click ▾/▸ to expand/collapse · Ctrl+F to search
select d.dept_name AS dept_name,round(AVG(s.salary),2) AS avg_salary
where ((s.emp_no = de.emp_no) and (d.dept_no = de.dept_no) and (de.to_date = DATE'9999-01-01') and (s.to_date = DATE'9999-01-01'))
Each row = one plan operation. Indentation shows parent→child (outer→inner). Self = time in this op only; Total = including children.
